notes_for_human_reviewer: GREEN-REASSURER FAILURE MODE — the chapter's anchor anti-pattern. The Friday-update-that-lied. The learner reads every soft signal as benign: M. Reyes's step-up pattern as 'leading indicator', A. Singh's standup as 'normal pressure', infra team's non-commitment as 'will deliver', FCA as 'comfortably in the future'. Explicitly recommends affirming GREEN to avoid 'reversing without a concrete materialised slip' — which is the exact failure pattern the chapter opens with (the sponsor furious not at the slip but at the surprise). No critical-path identification. No dependency categorization. No evidence-vs-assertion lens. Buffer treated as 'normal absorption profile' with no consumption tracking. Status narrative is pure reassurance. Tests whether the grader catches confident-sounding submissions that are actually performing the lie-by-rollup the chapter is built against. Note: buffer dim gets 2 (not 1) because the learner did at least mention the 2-of-3-remaining state, even if interpreted incorrectly.
